prompt: A photo of the adult female panda patient in a medium shot seated in the psychologist's office, beginning to open up emotionally. Soft unobtrusive office background, shallow depth of field, warm neutral color palette, natural soft lighting, realistic therapeutic setting, sincere not comedic, photorealistic.
